thesis.statement: The movie should feel precise, intimate, and slightly contaminated. Beauty is allowed, but it always carries a trace of threat.
principles: Let tenderness and danger share the same visual language.

palette.description: Acid green marks unstable care against soft flesh tones and clinical whites.

observations.text: Green should feel biological and emotionally charged.

toneMood.description: Bright clean spaces feel too close, while colored practicals introduce threat.

composition.description: Frames are centered and controlled until bodily pressure breaks them.

patterns.name: Clinical symmetry
patterns.description: Use centered frames when identity or body becomes an argument.

lighting.description: Institutional softness is interrupted by charged colored sources.

patterns.name: Contaminated practicals
patterns.description: Let green practicals corrupt clean rooms.

texture.description: Skin, gloss, condensation, and plastic make clean spaces feel biological.

observations.text: Surfaces should be touchable, slightly wet, and too visible.

camera.description: Camera grammar stays precise until control collapses.

movement.name: Controlled drift
movement.description: Move slowly when unease merges with desire.

motion.name: Sudden rupture
motion.description: Reserve abrupt motion for breaks in control.

framing.name: Body as diagram
framing.description: Frame bodies like evidence without losing empathy.
